title: Industry and health professionals - Canada.ca
content:
## Industry and health professionals
To order any of the following resources, please contact the Consumer Product Safety Program using the General Enquiries Form , or by phone using our toll-free line 1-866-662-0666.

## Latest Reports and Publications
- Annual Compliance and Enforcement Reports
- Consumer Product Enforcement Summary Reports
- Consumer Product and Cosmetics Reports Received
- Industry Guide for the Classification of Cribs, Cradles, Bassinets and Related Products
- Industry Guide to Children's Jewellery
- Guide to Notices of Violation and Administrative Monetary Penalties under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Cosmetics and Personal Care

### Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Information for Regulated Parties on the Enforcement Approach for the General Prohibitions under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Guide to Notices of Violation and Administrative Monetary Penalties under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Canada Consumer Product Safety Act - Information for Direct Sellers (Suppliers and Independent Sales Contractors)
- Canada Consumer Product Safety Act Quick Reference Guide
- Canada Consumer Product Safety Act - Information for Retailers
- Canada Consumer Product Safety Act: Preparing and Maintaining Documents
- Guidance on Mandatory Incident Reporting under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act - Section 14 Duties in the Event of an Incident
- Guidance on Preparing and Maintaining Documents under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act (CCPSA) - Section 13
- Industry Guidance - "Danger to Human Health or Safety" Posed by Consumer Products
- Recalling Consumer Products - A Guide for Industry

### Cosmetics and Personal Care
- Industry Guide for the labelling of cosmetics
- Guidance Document: Classification of Products at the Cosmetic-Drug Interface
- Guidance document: Animal testing ban on cosmetics
- Heavy Metals in Cosmetics
- Labelling Requirements for Cosmetics in Pressurized Containers
- Industry Guide to Children's Jewellery
- Children's Sleepwear: Flammability Requirement       Guidelines
- Flammability of Textile Products in Canada
- Industry Guide to the Glazed Ceramics and Glassware       Regulations
- Industry Guide to the Consumer Chemicals and       Containers Regulations (2001) – Third Edition
- Industry Guide for the Classification of       Cribs, Cradles, Bassinets and Sleep Accessories
- Industry Guide to Canadian Requirements for       Carpets and Other Textile Floor Coverings
- Industry Guide to Canadian Requirements for       Lighters
- Industry Guide to Canadian Requirements for       Tents
- Industry Guide to Health Canada's Safety       Requirements for Children's Toys and Related Products
- Industry Guide to Mattress Flammability       Requirements in Canada
- Industry Guide to Second-hand Products       (Including Children's Products)
- Industry Guide to Vaping Products Subject to       the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Information for Regulated Parties Regarding       the Consumer Products Containing Lead Regulations
- Reference Manual for the Consumer Chemicals and Containers Regulations, 2001 of the Hazardous Products Act
- Information for Art Class Teachers: Chemical Safety
- Trilateral initiative project between       Canada, United States and Mexico on the safety of AC powered chargers
- Trilateral initiative project between       Canada, United States and Mexico on the safety of power banks

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
